title: Update oscore_protect_request docs and ensure SSN/NVM error paths in tests
description: Update the doxygen comment in oscore.h for oscore_protect_request to document the new NVM error path, SSN persistence on success, and OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED return. Add or update test in lichen/tests/oscore/src/main.c to cover the dedicated NVM failure path. Reference project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.4.2.
